_comment: Source-of-truth list of the canonical .claude configuration standard that /adopt-ai-rules installs (§6.4). The repo dogfoods exactly what it installs: these paths are resolved relative to the payload root ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}. NEVER includes settings.local.json, CLAUDE.local.md, .adopt-backups/, node_modules, or the sample app (src/, tests/, migrations/).
